Metadata.title: Loyalty CRM
Metadata.description: Admin dashboard for the loyalty program

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.subtitle: Pick a type and the customers to send it to.
Notifications.sendDescription: Sending runs in the background and respects each customer's marketing preferences.

Auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Check your inbox.
Auth.magicLinkError: We couldn't send the sign-in link
Auth.errorForbidden: You don't have access to that section. Sign in with an authorized account.
Auth.brandSub: Identify the member, grant stamps and validate redemptions. No prices, no charges — just rewards.
Auth.staffSubtitle: Passwordless access. We'll email a magic link to your work address.
Auth.authorizedOnly: Authorized staff only. Access is logged for audit.
Auth.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to
Auth.openOnDevice: Open it on this device to continue.
Auth.linkExpires: The link expires in 10 minutes. Didn't arrive? Check spam.
Auth.pinHint: Enter your 4-digit PIN to unlock the register on this tablet.

Customers.title: Customers
Customers.subtitle: Your member base and their loyalty activity.
Customers.stampsRemaining: {n} to go for the next reward
Customers.deleteDescription: This removes {name} and their loyalty history. This cannot be undone.

Shortlinks.title: Short links
Shortlinks.subtitle: Shorten URLs for SMS/WhatsApp and track clicks.

Rewards.title: Rewards
Rewards.subtitle: Perks your customers redeem with stamps or points.
Rewards.deleteDescription: This removes “{name}”. This cannot be undone.

WhatsAppOutbox.title: WhatsApp Outbox
WhatsAppOutbox.subtitle: Messages persisted by the outbox provider in @loyalty/whatsapp. Dev + preview only.
WhatsAppOutbox.emptyDescription: When any flow triggers a send via the outbox provider, you'll see it here.
WhatsAppOutbox.emptyHint: Expecting messages? Make sure the app runs with WHATSAPP_PROVIDER=outbox.

SmsOutbox.title: SMS Outbox
SmsOutbox.subtitle: Messages persisted by the outbox provider in @loyalty/sms. Dev + preview only.
SmsOutbox.emptyDescription: When any flow triggers an SMS via the outbox provider, you'll see it here.
SmsOutbox.emptyHint: Expecting messages? Make sure the app runs with SMS_PROVIDER=outbox.

EmailOutbox.title: Email Outbox
EmailOutbox.subtitle: Emails persisted by the outbox provider in @loyalty/email. Dev + preview only.
EmailOutbox.emptyDescription: When any flow triggers an email via the outbox provider, you'll see it here.
EmailOutbox.emptyHint: Expecting emails? Make sure the app runs with EMAIL_PROVIDER=outbox.
EmailOutbox.testResendHint: Sends a real email via Resend.
EmailOutbox.testSent: Test email queued via {mailer}. If the active provider is outbox it will appear below in a few seconds.

PushOutbox.title: Push Outbox
PushOutbox.subtitle: Push notifications persisted by the outbox provider in @loyalty/push. Dev + preview only.
PushOutbox.emptyDescription: When any flow triggers a push via the outbox provider, you'll see it here.
PushOutbox.emptyHint: Expecting pushes? Make sure the app runs with PUSH_PROVIDER=outbox.
PushOutbox.testSent: Push sent to {count, plural, one {# device} other {# devices}}. It will appear below in a few seconds.

Realtime.title: Realtime smoke
Realtime.notConfiguredDescription: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_PARTYKIT_HOST + PARTYKIT_HOST + PARTYKIT_PROJECT + REALTIME_AUTH_SECRET to enable the channel.
Realtime.sendDescription: Publishes a dev.hello event into your own room. You'll see it below within milliseconds.
Realtime.eventsDescription: Last 25 live events in your room.
Realtime.emptyLog: No events yet. Wait for the handshake (should be instant) and fire a hello.

Promotions.title: Promotions
Promotions.subtitle: Drive sales with configurable rules.
Promotions.deleteDescription: This removes “{name}”. This cannot be undone.
Promotions.notifyHint: Send a push when the promo goes live.

Cashier.capBanner: You've hit this cashier's daily stamp cap. Ask a supervisor to reset the counter.
Cashier.searchHint: Search the member by name or phone to record their purchase.
Cashier.walletError: We couldn't load the member's card. Try again.
Cashier.recordPurchaseHint: Enter the purchase amount to add the stamp.
Cashier.purchaseError: We couldn't record the purchase. Try again.
Cashier.rewardPendingToast: The member has a reward to claim. Scan their QR.
Cashier.rewardPendingHint: The member completed their card. Scan the QR in their app to hand over the reward.
Cashier.aimCameraReward: Aim the camera at the member's reward QR
Cashier.cameraError: We couldn't access the camera. Enable the permission in your browser.
Cashier.handRewardToCustomer: Hand the reward to the member.
Cashier.notRewardCode: That code is not a reward code.
Cashier.identifyHint: Scan the member QR to start adding stamps.
Cashier.aimCamera: Point the camera at the member's code
Cashier.phoneHint: Enter the number the member registered with.
Cashier.nudgeToGo: {count, plural, one {# stamp to their next reward} other {# stamps to their next reward}}
Cashier.scanRedeemHint: The member generates a single-use code in their app. Scan it to validate.
Cashier.insufficientShort: Not enough stamps. {count} short for this reward.
Cashier.supervisorPinHint: A stamp is money: redemptions need a manager's approval.

notfound.title: Member not found
notfound.body: No account matches those details. Check the number or invite the customer to sign up in the app.

insufficient.title: Not enough stamps
insufficient.body: The member doesn't have enough stamps for this reward yet. Add stamps on this purchase and try again.

cap.title: Daily cap reached
cap.body: This cashier hit the daily stamp limit. A supervisor must reset the counter to continue.

expired.title: Expired or invalid code
expired.body: This redemption code was already used or expired. Ask the member to generate a new one in their app.

camera.title: Enable the camera
camera.body: We need camera permission to scan codes. Allow access in the browser settings.

Cashier.switchBody: The register will lock on this tablet and the next cashier must start their shift.
Cashier.name: Name
Cashier.avatarHint: Pick an avatar or upload a photo.
Cashier.avatarErrorType: Invalid format. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.

Admin.comingSoon: This section is on the way. We're building it.

Inbox.title: Notifications
Inbox.promoLive: 2×1 promo published and pushed to members.
Inbox.capReached: T4 Norte register hit the daily stamp cap.

Products.title: Products
Products.subtitle: Your catalog: variants, categories and more.
Products.deleteDescription: This removes “{name}”. This cannot be undone.
Products.mediaHint: Drag and drop, or pick an icon
Products.mediaFormats: Min recommended size: 1280px / WEBP, PNG, JPEG or GIF
Products.videoHint: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo link
Products.costHint: Internal only, customers wont see it.
Products.variantsHint: Define options (e.g. Size) and variants are generated with their price.
Products.noVariants: Add an option to generate variants.
Products.skuHint: Internal code to track products with variants.
Products.marketingHint: Feature your products on Instagram and Google.
Products.featuredHint: Pick which sections to feature this product in.
Products.seoHint: Improve visibility on Google and social.
Products.seoDescPlaceholder: e.g. The best smoothie in town.

cat.title: Categories
cat.subtitle: Organize products into categories and subcategories shown in the store menu.

Products.libraryHint: Reuse an option you already made or create a new one; it stays available for the next product.

Command.title: Search
Command.description: Find a section or run an action.

Campaigns.title: Campaigns
Campaigns.subtitle: Automate messages and measure their impact.
Campaigns.previewEmpty: Select a channel to see the preview.
Campaigns.previewBodyPlaceholder: Your campaign message body goes here.

Banners.title: Banners
Banners.subtitle: Featured cards on the customer app home.

brand.title: Brand & store
brand.desc: Your store name, logo and color.

loyalty.stampsPerRewardHint: How many stamps for a reward

Stores.subtitle: Your locations and their info.

Employees.title: Employees
Employees.subtitle: Who runs the register and admins.
